name: Plum Beans
recipeIngredient: 1/2 teaspoon crushed hot red pepper flakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the kidney beans overnight in water to cover.
2. Drain and rinse the beans the next day.
3. Place the beans in a large pot and cover with fresh water.
4. Bring to a boil with half of the garlic (cut), 1/4 teaspoon red pepper flakes, 1/4 teaspoon salt, bay leaf, and 2 tablespoons vinegar.
5. Simmer until tender, about 1 hour.
6. Drain the beans.
7. While still warm, stir in the remaining garlic, 1/4 teaspoon red pepper flakes, 1/4 teaspoon salt, 2 tablespoons vinegar, plum jam, cilantro, and black pepper to taste.
8. Serve at room temperature.
